name: Default Aura Knowledge Publishing Policy
description: Minimum bar for publishing an article in the Aura Knowledge garden: human review, provenance, and hash alignment.

rules.requirement: A published article must have at least one provenance review with reviewer type human and status approved.
The latest approved review must record the contentHash of the article.md that was approved.
The artifact must reference a published policy file that exists in the policies/ directory.
Every published claim must contain at least one evidence packet with a source and snippet.
Any agent role that produced or revised content must be recorded in provenance.agents with input and output hashes.
